messages.text: Basket 1: a wicker basket shaped like a mouse, with little ears and a pointed snout sticking out from one side.
Placed it. Go to Basket 2.
Basket 2: a deep round wicker basket with a thick dark arched handle and a bucket-like body.
Is it the darker round bucket with the thicker handle rather than the lighter honey-colored one?
Basket 2: yes — the darker round bucket with the thicker handle, and it has a plain horizontal band right under the rim.
Placed it. Go to Basket 3.
Basket 3: a rectangular picnic basket with a tall center handle and a hinged lid flipped open on one side. Let me know when you’ve got it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 4.
Basket 4: an oval wicker basket with a single upright handle wrapped in pale bands, with little red accents where the handle meets the sides. Let me know when you’ve got it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 5.
Basket 5: a rectangular wicker basket with a thick twisted handle arching over the top and a chunky open weave. Let me know when you’ve got it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 6.
Basket 6: a round wicker basket shaped like a cat’s face, seen straight on with little ears, whiskers, and tiny feet at the bottom. Let me know when you’ve got it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 7.
Basket 7: a rectangular wicker basket with a single arch handle, dark greenish sides, and lighter tan trim across the top and edges. Let me know when you’ve placed it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 8.
Basket 8: a small rounded bucket basket with a single handle, made of dark gray-brown wicker with a thick dark rim and lighter bands near the bottom. Let me know when you’ve placed it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 9.
Basket 9: a tall cylindrical wicker basket with straight sides and two small loop handles near the rim, not a big arching handle. Let me know when you’ve placed it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 10.
Basket 10: a shallow round tray-like basket with a flat spiral bottom and one thin pale handle over the top. Let me know when you’ve placed it.
Placed it. Go to Basket 11.
